title: Query a saved view
excerpt:
Hi Everyone, 
Wondering if there is a way to List a board’s items as they would appear in a saved view (with filters and multi-sort functionality). I’m using Make for my integrations, but I don’t see an option in the sta…

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

Wondering if there is a way to List a board’s items as they would appear in a saved view (with filters and multi-sort functionality). I’m using Make for my integrations, but I don’t see an option in the standard “List items…” modules. If there’s a way to do it with GraphQL, then I could probably make that work.

If there’s not an easy fix, I’ll probably just rebuild this board in Airtable and use Make to update it when things change in Monday.

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah… I just found this thread, which I think answers my question

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @max!

I am glad you found the answer. Let us know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Matias.Monday , thanks for the response. My solution was to use Airtable instead of Monday, so if you have any other suggestions for querying a Monday board with multiple sorts applied, I would appreciate it.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @max,

As of today, there is no way of returning the items in the same order as a specific view using our API.

You can order them by creation date, but not according to a specific view in the board.

Let us know if you have other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
